description.value: The Fernhay eAV Standard Box (Package Cube) is a modular box body built on the eAV electric cutaway chassis. Designed for last-mile delivery and service upfits with universal attachment points for interior customization. Chassis designed by Fernhay, manufactured by EAVX.
Fernhay eAV electric cutaway chassis — designed by Fernhay, manufactured by EAVX

customization_option_basic_details__desc.value: Fully electric cutaway chassis platform. Includes powertrain, battery pack, frame, suspension, steering, and braking systems. Designed and manufactured by Fernhay.

description.value: Core modular box body — floor, walls, roof, and skeleton structure. Manufactured by EAVX.

customization_option_basic_details__desc.value: Core modular box body with composite floor, aluminum walls, fiberglass roof, and steel skeleton structure. Includes floor integration and chassis attachment hardware. Universal attachment points for interior upfit modules.
Aluminum roll-up door on rear of box body. Standard for package delivery applications.
Double swing-out doors on rear of box body. 270-degree opening for full cargo access.
Sliding side door for curbside access. Ideal for delivery routes requiring frequent stops.
Roll-up doors on both rear and curbside for maximum access flexibility.

description.value: Select interior upfit configuration for the box body

customization_option_basic_details__desc.value: No interior upfit. Empty cargo area for custom or third-party upfit installations.

Modular shelf system designed for parcel sorting and delivery. Multiple shelf tiers with adjustable dividers. Optimized for last-mile delivery operations (UPS, USPS, Amazon DSP, DutchX, TikTok Shop, Temu, Alibaba).
Workbench, tool storage cabinets, and ladder rack configuration. Designed for utility and telecom service operations (Spectrum, Verizon, AT&T, Comcast, XCEL Energy, Con-Edison).
Overhead hanging rod system for garment transport. Includes adjustable height rods and garment retention clips. Designed for dry cleaning pickup and delivery services.
Heavy-duty slide-out drawer system for organized tool and parts storage. Lockable drawers with ball-bearing slides. Ideal for service and maintenance operations.
Standard white exterior finish. Included in base price.
Custom exterior color matched to customer specifications. Includes fleet branding color matching.

description.value: Select a charging solution for your vehicle

customization_option_basic_details__desc.value: Standard Level 2 AC charging unit for overnight depot charging. Ideal for fleet operations with predictable schedules.
DC fast charging unit enabling rapid charging at commercial depots. 80% charge in under 1 hour.
